layoutRegions.name: change-summary
layoutRegions.purpose: At-a-glance counts for open edits, blocked publishes, ready windows, and rollback schedules.

layoutRegions.name: policy-ledger
layoutRegions.purpose: Keyboard-focusable rows for access policy edits with approver, principal, publish, and status context.

layoutRegions.name: simulation-history
layoutRegions.purpose: Panels for rule diffs, simulation snapshots, publish history, and rollback-safe policy records.

components.name: ChangeRow
components.purpose: Focusable policy edit row with approver chain, affected principals, and publish state.
interactions: hover and focus-visible states expose row selection
publish state is shown with semantic danger, warning, info, or success

components.name: DiffCard
components.purpose: Rule diff card that keeps before, after, and affected principal impact visible.
interactions: tone label stays visible without overlapping text
card sizing remains stable across responsive breakpoints

components.name: RollbackList
components.purpose: Ordered policy publish checklist for rollback-safe change history.
interactions: primary publish action has visible hover and focus-visible states
guardrail numbers are stable and token-colored

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
